_help._note: Allowed values + requirements per field (this _help block is ignored by the gate — keep or delete). Run `plumb schema` for the full reference.
_help.task_id: required — ticket/issue/branch id (also the receipt filename)
_help.agent_id: required — which agent or human did the work
_help.intent: required — what + why, plain language — the semantic review reads this
_help.self_modifying: one of: true | false — required — MUST be true if changed_files touch policy.protected_paths; touching one with false is a hard fail; true routes to human review
_help.validation_plan: required — each: { command, reason, required, id?, ci_covered? }
_help.validation_plan[].required: one of: true | false — required — is this check mandatory
_help.validation_plan[].id: optional — optional step id; evidence is matched to it via execution_evidence[].step (robust to a command wording diff)
_help.validation_plan[].ci_covered: one of: true | false — optional — step is corroborated by the ci-evidence gate (real CI run), not manual evidence — may be 'skipped'; also auto-recognized when command matches a policy ci_evidence_checks entry
_help.execution_evidence: required — each: { command, status, output_ref?, skip_reason?, step? }
_help.execution_evidence[].status: one of: passed | failed | skipped — required — required steps must be 'passed' (unless CI-covered); use skip_reason when 'skipped'
_help.execution_evidence[].step: optional — optional id of the validation_plan step this evidence is for (matches validation_plan[].id)
_help.changed_files: required — set by `plumb receipt --write` — don't hand-edit
_help.base_sha: optional — pinned merge-base the diff was computed against — makes gate verification deterministic; set by `plumb receipt --write` — never hand-edit
_help.diff_sha256: required — set by `plumb receipt --write` — never hand-edit (computed from base_sha)
_help.result_summary: required — what changed + how it was verified

intent: Gate-trust v2, folding three tickets for one coordinated release. #56: add a materiality axis (material/optional/noise) + a crisp 3-way reviewer rubric so verdict routing is deterministic — any material, agent-fixable finding routes to REWORK even on a protected surface; REVIEW is human-only with no agent-fixable items left; optional-but-good findings are auto-filed as deduped follow-up issues instead of skipped; noise is dropped. #49: `plumb check` auto-discovery now finds an untracked receipt (git status --porcelain) so it works before `git add`, LOCAL only (CI stays diff-based). #48: refresh README Status to v0.4.x and rewrite both AGENTS.md TL;DRs/closings around the one idempotent `receipt --write` step.

validation_plan.reason: Runs the full node:test suite, including new verdict-classification.test.ts (#56 routing/materiality/follow-up fingerprint) and check-untracked-receipt.test.ts (#49 discovery), proving the classification routing and first-run ergonomics.
tsc typechecks the new materiality field on ReviewFinding, the follow_ups capsule field, and the github.ts follow-up-issue API wiring.
Rebuilds the committed dist/index.js action artifact so the CI gate runs the same logic as source (kept in sync by the dist-check job).

execution_evidence.output_ref: dist/index.js rebuilt; cli.js + bundle both execute after the entrypoint guard

result_summary: #56: added ReviewFinding.materiality + FailureCapsule.follow_ups (types.ts); rewrote the reviewer prompt with a 3-way rubric and bumped PROMPT_VERSION to v3 (review.ts); partitionFindings now splits advisory into optional follow-ups vs dropped noise; selectVerdict already routes agent-fixable to REWORK over the protected floor (added tests proving the sequencing). New github.ts createFollowUpIssue/fileFollowUps auto-file deduped follow-up issues, wired into the `run` reporting path. #49: added uncommittedReceipts() + an allowUntracked fallback in resolveReceiptPath (local-only; CI diff-based), plus an import.meta entrypoint guard so cli.ts is importable by tests. #48: README Status -> v0.4.x with the current gate model; both AGENTS.md TL;DRs/closings rewritten around `receipt --write`. Verified: full suite 270/270 pass, clean tsc build, fresh bundle, and this receipt's shape PASS locally (dogfood #53/#55). self_modifying:true (touches .plumbline/AGENTS.md, src/github.ts, src/types.ts). Version tag deliberately NOT moved — release is a separate step.
